en: Martin, morning. Morning. Morning. Right, what news? Well, as soon as we've got the acoustic deck on, you'll have a waterproof building, you'll be able to have your topping out ceremony, and we'll be straight in with the second fix electrics and the joinery simultaneously.
So what are you really saying, are we still on schedule? Yes. Right, and what I really need to know is, have the unit costs risen dramatically? No.
Oh, and you should be ready for occupation on or before the due contract date.
Oh, good, good. Um, two words. Penalty clauses. Now, I've been meaning to discuss this with you for some time, and, um...
